privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a Master Batch Production Record (BPR) document using Apache OpenOffice Writer. The input data is synthetically generated during setup and contains information for Batch Number BPR-2024-1847 of the product 'Hydrating Facial Serum'. The company is identified as 'Lakeshore Contract Manufacturing, Inc.' in the source data, though the metadata abbreviates it to 'Lakeshore'. The input file batch_data.json is created at /home/ga/Documents/batch_data.json and contains 12 raw materials, 5 equipment items, 8 manufacturing steps, and 8 in-process quality checks. The output document should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/BPR-2024-1847.odt. The task requires specific document elements: table of contents, page numbers, at least 3 tables, at least 6 Heading 1 sections, and at least 6 Heading 2 subsections. Regulatory references included are 21 CFR Part 211, ISO 22716:2007, and USP <61>.
